'''Drell Kahmf''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who acquired and preserved [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul's]] brain and spinal cord alive in a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] in his [[Laboratory of Drell Kahmf|lab]] a few years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He used Maul's brain to create a [[solid-state hologram]] of Maul, which terrorized [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia's]] capital. However, the hologram was defeated by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|17|Phantom Menaces}} {{1st}}
